# datadog_authn_mapping (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing Datadog authn mapping.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Filter all mappings by the given string.
- `id` (String) The ID of this authn_mapping data source.
- `page_number` (Number) Specific page number to return.
- `page_size` (Number) Size for a given page. The maximum allowed value is 100.

### Read-Only

- `attribute_key` (String) Key portion of a key/value pair of the attribute sent from the Identity Provider.
- `attribute_value` (String) Value portion of a key/value pair of the attribute sent from the Identity Provider.
- `modified_at` (String) Time of last AuthN Mapping modification.
- `saml_assertion_attribute_id` (String) The ID of the SAML assertion attribute.
